title: Heading topic fulfillment gate fixture
description: A heading support section that contains the needed duration facts but does not fulfill the heading promise clearly enough until later in the prose.

copilot_issue.analyzer_note: The section mentions timing but does not fulfill the heading promise clearly enough at the start of the support.
copilot_issue.snippet: Timing varies with eclipse geometry and where you stand in the path of totality. In most events, totality lasts only a few minutes, and the theoretical maximum is about 7 minutes 30 seconds.
heading_chain: How long can totality last during a solar eclipse?

nodes.text: How long can totality last during a solar eclipse?
Timing varies with eclipse geometry and where you stand in the path of totality. In most events, totality lasts only a few minutes, and the theoretical maximum is about 7 minutes 30 seconds.

manifest.plain_text:
How long can totality last during a solar eclipse?

Timing varies with eclipse geometry and where you stand in the path of totality. In most events, totality lasts only a few minutes, and the theoretical maximum is about 7 minutes 30 seconds.
